title: Linking Books
description: Teleport using linking books from the Myst video game series
body:
Welcome to _Linking Books_, the fun and lore-rich mod that brings the teleportation mechanics from the _Myst_ series of video games to _Minecraft_. Use linking books and linking portals to teleport between places. Add special effects to linking books that affect teleportation. Plus additional miscellaneous blocks inspired by the _Myst_ universe.

Now includes Relto, a personal island Age in the clouds.

..........

For more information, visit the [wiki](https://github.com/TheFloydman/linking-books/wiki).

..........


Join us on Discord at https://discord.gg/eMSubn6tRt.
